decision: decoration.screen_shader remains writable, but is formally marked as requiring display/render high-risk gate migration and future watchdog/dead-man recovery proof before stronger enforcement or compile-aware validation.

row.reasonOrdinaryPathValidationIsInsufficie: Official source reads non-empty values as config-relative files and compiles file contents as the final screen fragment shader. A syntactically safe path does not prove shader content is display/render safe.

requiredHighRiskGateMetadata.watchdogRequirement: screen shader display/render watchdog proof is required before full gated enforcement; future gate must persist a plan and backup before mutation, use separate process confirm, timeout restore, result logging, and recovery independent of visible display or live render state
requiredHighRiskGateMetadata.reviewWarning: Display/render sensitive: non-empty values are config-relative shader files compiled as the final screen fragment shader. Path validation is not display/render safety proof; keep writable only with screen-shader high-risk warning until a future display/render watchdog migration proof is completed.

proofStillMissing: dedicated display/render watchdog migration proof for decoration.screen_shader
backup-before-mutation proof scoped to screen shader high-risk gate
separate process confirm proof scoped to screen shader high-risk gate
timeout restore proof scoped to screen shader high-risk gate
result log proof scoped to screen shader high-risk gate
decision whether production writes must be blocked until gate enforcement exists
compile-aware validation design using fixture/temp files only

reconciliation.reasonNotIncludedInEnabledHighRiskAudit: The row is already writable from earlier normal-path support and has not completed high-risk watchdog proof. This sprint records migration-required metadata instead of claiming completed gated enablement.
reconciliation.recommendedRepresentation: Represent as a writable display/render high-risk migration candidate with required gate metadata and missing watchdog proof until a later migration sprint completes or proposes blocking/removal with user approval.

nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader display/render watchdog migration proof sprint: use fixture/temp files only to prove backup-before-mutation, separate process confirm, timeout restore, result logging, visible-display-independent recovery, and live-render-state-independent recovery; do not run live shader compile or reload Hyprland.
